summary: Full E2E test of VanguardCX. 24/24 backend pytest passed (auth, KB, calls, analyze+summary LLM, analytics, workflows, integrations, webhooks). Frontend E2E passed landing, login, workspace (start call -> utterances -> AI Assist analyze -> compliance + NBA + KB suggestions + suggested response -> End & summarize with tags), KB (seed/search), Analytics, Settings (webhook add), History. All data-testids wired. LLM responses were populated and rendered correctly.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer warns width(-1)/height(-1) – containers need explicit min-height/min-width to suppress recharts warning (cosmetic, charts still render).

action_items: (Optional) Set min-height on Recharts ResponsiveContainer wrapper in Analytics to silence width/height=-1 console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: kb_search uses keyword-only scoring (not true semantic). Fine for MVP but consider embeddings later.
/api/calls/{id}/summary marks call 'completed' – OK but /end also does same; both paths consistent.
get_current_user returns raw mongo doc minus _id/password – includes created_at (fine).
server.py is 621 lines – close to 700 threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, kb, calls, analytics, integrations).
No rate limiting on LLM endpoints – could be abused.
test_credentials: test@vanguard.ai / Test1234 (pre-seeded). Fresh accounts also created dynamically in backend_test.py.
seed_data_creation: KB seed endpoint called; 5 demo docs created. One TEST_ webhook created then deleted. Test calls created during E2E.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is comprehensive (24 tests). Whisper /audio endpoint not tested (no sample audio). Frontend testids verified: brand-logo, nav-login, hero-cta-start, login-form/email/password/submit, btn-start-call, input-customer, input-agent, btn-send-customer, btn-send-agent, btn-analyze, btn-end-call, kb-seed-btn, kb-search-input, kb-search-btn, wh-name, wh-url, wh-add, analytics-page, settings-page, history-page.
